user.title: Meteoblue Weather
user.description: Get a free API key (100,000 requests/year) from http://meteoblue.com. You can use your Home Assistant home coordinates or enter custom latitude/longitude.

data_description.use_home_coordinates: Use the coordinates configured in Home Assistant (Settings > System > General).
data_description.latitude: Latitude (-90 to 90). Only used when not using home location.
data_description.longitude: Longitude (-180 to 180). Only used when not using home location.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Meteoblue API

init.title: Meteoblue options
init.description: Change the location used for weather data.
